name: Policy Exemption Audit
description: Advisory mod that surfaces evidence claiming a policy exemption/waiver/accepted-risk (exempt/waiver/wontfix/accepted risk/policy exception/...) so a policy owner can re-approve it.
advises_on: Policy-exemption/waiver/accepted-risk CLAIMS (exempt/waiver/grandfathered/wontfix/accepted risk/policy exception/suppress finding/...) in title + body + evidence excerpts.
requirements: The neutral evidence stream (AdapterEmission) — no credentials, no live network.

ui.card_blurb: Surfaces policy-exemption/waiver claims for re-approval; a routing signal, never a finding-of-record.
